title: agrostis tenuis var. pumila
intro: Agrostis tenuis var. pumila, commonly known as dwarf bent grass, is a low-growing, perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Agrostis tenuis var. pumila are believed to provide relief from symptoms such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits that promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
